TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kaidi, title = Kaidi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kaidi} }

S.FORM: alang Kaidi ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 174 buwan, 530 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 492 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 38 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 88%, Bunun 1%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kaidi hya' ga Yungkilu. tay mkyahu' na Kaidi hya' ga Tjuruguai. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kaidi ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 174 buwan, 530 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 492 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 38 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 88%, Bunun 1%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kaidi hya' ga Yungkilu. tay mkyahu' na Kaidi hya' ga Tjuruguai. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kai*i ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu rajijoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kai*i ħjaʔ ɣa juŋkilu. taj mkjaħuʔ na kai*i ħjaʔ ɣa tjuruɣuai. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
